# Security Policy

This repository hosts the public-facing README, screenshots, and landing materials for the JustAi project. The engineering source lives in a separate repo (currently private).

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security issue in:

- **The live demo at `justai-demo.vercel.app`** — the static client-side simulation
- **The materials in this repository**

please report privately by emailing **justinleopard@gmail.com** with the subject line `[JustAi Security]`.

Vulnerabilities in upstream dependencies (mini-swe-agent, claude-flow, LiteLLM, Vercel infrastructure) should be reported to those projects directly.

## Acknowledgement

We will acknowledge receipt within 72 hours. Coordinated disclosure: we will work with you on a fix and a public advisory before any details are shared broadly.
